title: Garlicky Crunchy Kenyan Garlic Stew
description: A comforting stew featuring a soffritto base and a generous amount of garlic.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute, stirring frequently.
Add the carrots and potatoes and cook for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the chopped fenugreek leaves and cook until they wilt, about 2 minutes.
Pour in the single cream and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Simmer the stew over low heat for 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Garnish with crunchy chopped peanuts before serving.
